prompt: TRUE chunky pixel-art ability icon only, exact 32×32 logical pixel grid rendered large. Snareburst: a circular toothed trap cord snapping shut around three inward arrowheads with one compact stun star, clearly an area snare burst. Shrink the glyph — long side about 26–28 logical pixels with generous empty magenta. At least THREE full #ff00ff cells clear on every edge. Flat blocks, structures at least 3 pixels, selective charcoal-plum outline, upper-left lighting. Use trap iron, rope gold, forest green, warning orange-red, pale impact; source-local colors, no named game palette. Solid #ff00ff background. No victim, hunter, text, UI border, ground scene, cast shadow, diffuse glow, loose debris, gradient, anti-aliasing, blur, dithering, watermark, or transparency.

color_reduce.note: Task-local flat-fill cluster so source-local legend stays within A–Z/a–z/0–9 grid alphabet; rebuild is from committed source.grid, not provider raw.
